user.title: Parcel Aggregator
user.description: Combines parcel counts and next-delivery timestamps from the installed DHL, PostNL, and DPD integrations into a single set of sensors. Click Submit to add.

abort.already_configured: Parcel Aggregator is already set up.

no_sources.title: No carrier integrations found
no_sources.description: Parcel Aggregator did not detect any source sensors. Install at least one of the supported carrier integrations ({carriers}), make sure it is authenticated, then reload Parcel Aggregator to pick it up.
